intent_boundary: External PRD to DRD harness rule repair only; no new product capability and no release or lock stage for external PRD runs.

findings.why_it_breaks: Final DRD could retain process markers such as candidate wording, making reader-facing final output indistinguishable from review evidence.
findings.fix_direction: Add final reader-structure validation for strict staged compiler output and constitution/output-format clauses.

findings.why_it_breaks: Important visible PRD page details can be collapsed into summaries without a separate inventory, so omissions are hard to detect.
findings.fix_direction: Create source-bound page detail inventory and fail page detail conservation when required source details are absent from FINAL_DRD.md.

findings.why_it_breaks: Figma reconstruction had no enforceable module/function/page/state order, so output frame ordering could drift by filesystem or author habit.
findings.fix_direction: Require page_arrangement_order and validate module -> function_group -> base page -> state variant -> frame order.

findings.why_it_breaks: Generated or inferred pages were not distinguishable from PRD-explicit pages, weakening review routing and downstream implementation trust.
findings.fix_direction: Require derivation_origin, derivation_basis_refs, human-review flag, and deterministic variant/frame order fields.

findings.why_it_breaks: Installed harness rejected a valid package-root current_capsule output path, preventing real external PRD runs even when tests with tmp work_dir passed.
findings.fix_direction: Allow output scope under both work_dir/current_capsule/outputs and the start-package current_capsule/outputs root while still requiring output_dir to remain inside work_dir.

findings.why_it_breaks: The candidate allowed_write_paths omitted package and program rebinding files that changed to keep the complete package and P2 build-lock references verifiable.
findings.fix_direction: Add package root/manifest and program state/manifest rebinding writes to candidate scope evidence.

findings.why_it_breaks: Resume dry-run returns exit_code=1 when it correctly stops at BLOCK_HUMAN_GATE; recording the combined check as a single successful command exit code hides the expected gate behavior.
findings.fix_direction: Record staged-run and resume dry-run observed exit codes separately and mark the resume STOPPED result as an expected gate.

findings.why_it_breaks: The self-check implied a false pre-approved execution order. That weakens the trace because this is a post-release repair candidate that records and validates the repair after implementation.
findings.fix_direction: State honestly that this candidate is post-release repair evidence which trace-binds the constitution, repository implementation, tests, package rebinding, and installation.

post_fix_review.remaining_gate: Human review is still required before promoting this candidate.
